creator: andy.lavr@gmail.com
text:
Hi!


> Are you able to build it if you revert the latest commit to koffice-kde4
> (the one made a few days ago)?


Build and install fine. Thanks! Please close PR.



> Can you also paste the options you have selected for the port?


# This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
# No user-servicable parts inside!
# Options for koffice-kde4-2.3.3_2
_OPTIONS_READ=koffice-kde4-2.3.3_2
WITH_GTL=true
WITHOUT_SYBASE=true
WITHOUT_XBASE=true


---
Best regards, Andrei Lavreniyuk.
